UserDialog.DialogText: Please complete Thancred's stealth section of the solo duty A Frosty Reception.\n\nThe fight after Thancred's stealth section is automated.

UserDialog.DialogText:
Please complete the solo duty In from the Cold.

Yes, this is the creepy body-snatcher thing.

The Magitek Fuel is much closer if you intentionally die and set it to Very Easy.
